name: train-of-thought
description: Live thought tree companion for Claude Code

scripts.install:mac: npm run build:mac && rm -rf '/Applications/Thought Tree v1.app' && cp -R 'out/Thought Tree v1-darwin-arm64/Thought Tree v1.app' /Applications/ && open '/Applications/Thought Tree v1.app'

author: Jian Miguel Bautista
